about.title: About this App
about.intro:
Sokil helps archers log training sessions, track progress, unlock achievements, and manage equipment — with offline support and automatic sync.

Gamification keeps the hobby engaging.

Your data is stored securely and you choose what to share. Federations and clubs can run tournaments, manage applications, and organize events.

Empowering archery communities with modern technology.

current.auth: User Authentication & Authorization - JWT-based authentication with Google OAuth, password reset, and role-based access control
current.profiles: User Profiles - Personal profile with avatar, bio, location, and bow preferences
current.tournaments: Tournament Management - Create, edit, and manage tournaments with banners, attachments, location mapping, and application deadlines
current.applications: Tournament Applications - Submit applications with category, division, and equipment selection. Admin approval workflow with status tracking
current.patrols: Patrol System - Automatic patrol generation with intelligent grouping by bow category, division, and gender. Drag-and-drop management interface and PDF export
current.admin: Admin Panel - User management, application approvals, tournament oversight, and system administration
current.categories: Bow Categories Management - Complete CRUD for bow categories with rule references
current.clubs: Clubs & Federations - Club directory with filters, club membership system with verified/unverified badges, federation hierarchy, invitation flows, and admin management
current.divisions: Divisions Management - Age group and division management linked to rules
current.rules: Rules Management - Official archery rules with multi-language descriptions and PDF downloads
current.converter: Unit Converter - Convert between common archery measurements (inches/cm, pounds/kg, grains/grams, yards/meters)
current.uploads: File Upload System - Image processing for avatars and banners, attachment management for tournaments
current.multilang: Multi-language Support - Available in English, Ukrainian, Spanish, Italian, and Portuguese
current.pwa: Progressive Web App - Installable PWA with offline capabilities
current.trainingLog: Training Log - Record and manage personal training sessions with date, distance, target type, and shot count. Works offline with automatic sync
current.equipment: Equipment Management - Store and manage bow equipment sets with detailed specifications (draw weight, arrow spine, length, material, and more)
current.statistics: My Statistics - Personal activity dashboard with shots fired by period, distance traveled, training streak, training habits, tournament history, and monthly charts
current.achievements: Achievements & Gamification - Badge system is live: unlock milestones, stay motivated, and make archery even more fun. Share results and achievements with friends
current.security: Security & Privacy - Your data is stored securely with encrypted connections. You choose what to share — training stats, achievements, and profile visibility stay under your control

planned.socialSharing: Enhanced Social Sharing - Richer ways to share results, stats, and achievements with friends and club mates
planned.achievements: Achievements System - Demo page available, full tracking coming soon
planned.payments: Payments System - Demo page available, payment methods, subscriptions and tournament fee tracking coming soon
planned.competitions: Competition Features - Enhanced competition management and scoring
planned.duels: Friendly Challenges - Challenge other archers to friendly duels
planned.news: News & Updates - Tournament news and federation announcements
planned.calendar: Event Calendar - Integrated calendar view of tournaments and events
planned.knowledgeBase: Knowledge Base - Comprehensive archery encyclopedia and resources

about.contact: For feature requests, bug reports, or questions, please contact

trainings.title: My Trainings
trainings.info:
Chapter "My trainings" allows to create any amount of personal trainings, select target, distance, arrows count, etc.
For every training detailed statistic is available. User can share his stats.
IMPORTANT: information from training is not sending anywhere and is stored only on your device (at least now)
trainings.deleteHint: All results for this training will be deleted
trainings.empty: No training sessions yet. Add your first one!

emptyState.intro: Start with a common session or add your own.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Sokil
onboarding.readyForFirstSession: You're all set — now you can log your first training session.
onboarding.syncHelper: Backs up your training sessions and equipment across devices when you're online.
onboarding.syncPrivacyNote: Only trainings and equipment sync to your account. You can turn this off anytime in settings. Profile visibility controls who can see your shared progress.

steps.profileExplanation: Help friends recognize you. You can change this anytime in Profile.
steps.equipmentExplanation: Your default bow setup is pre-selected when you log training sessions. Add more sets later in My Equipment.
steps.getStartedExplanation: Choose your sync preferences and who can see your profile when you share progress.

limited.helper: Club members and federation admins can view your profile when they are signed in.
